item.title: Hoka's $200 waterproof shoes are perfect for spring hikes and are on sale for only $100
item.description: "Best cold-weather shoe I have ever owned."

item.title: Amazon is selling a versatile 3-piece rocking chair patio set for $70
item.description: "They're a super good price and very good quality."

item.title: IRS rules for the ‘One Big Beautiful Bill' car loan interest deduction: What you need to know
item.description: Learn how you can deduct up to $10,000 of car loan interest payments. This guide covers eligibility established by the “One Big Beautiful Bill.”

item.title: Coach Outlet's new Loved Signature Canvas collection starts at $35
item.description: We love its weathered, vintage look.

item.title: Walmart is selling lightweight $16 Swarovski rose earrings that come in three shades of gold
item.description: Shoppers describe them as a "delicate statement" piece that "looks expensive."
